creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
I can't reproduce this with

root@portjail:/usr/ports/shells/bash # cat Makefile.local 
OPTIONS_UNSET=  DOCS STATIC SYSBASHRC SYSLOG
OPTIONS_SET=    FDESCFS HELP NLS PORTS_READLINE

in a clean 13.3 amd64 poudriere bulk run, see:

https://critical.ch/people/0880fa18-53ca-11ef-bd74-10bf48e1088e/bash-5.2.32.log

Can you analyze the core dump with gdb to see what's going on?
